Chewy Oatmeal Raisin Cookies: Beat together 1 cup softened butter, 3/4 cup granulated sugar, and 3/4 cup brown sugar until creamy; mix in 2 eggs and 1 teaspoon vanilla extract. Combine 1 1/2 cups all-purpose flour, 1 teaspoon baking soda, 1 teaspoon cinnamon, and 1/2 teaspoon salt, then blend into the butter mixture. Stir in 3 cups old-fashioned rolled oats and 1 cup raisins. Drop by rounded tablespoons onto ungreased baking sheets and bake at 350°F for 10–12 minutes until golden. Let cool on the baking sheet for five minutes before transferring to a wire rack.
